---
title: "Plots"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: true 
---
# A place to make my scientific plots accessible to everyone. Ongoing work!

## Row

::: {.card fill=false expandable="false"}

### A young patch of the universe

<video autoplay loop muted playsinline width="100%">
  <source src="/images/universe_box.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

This is the output of one of my simulations, showing how quantum fluctuations of the vacuum emerge in time and make the early universe inhomogeneous. In this representation, the physical distance of each pixel increases exponentially because of the expansion.

<!-- ::: -->
